faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal service throughout Gowanus. Most nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can respond to emergency situations involving aggressive wasps threatening residents or businesses.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Gowanus, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Gowanus commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often nest in wall voids and ground cavities, while paper wasps build umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and awnings. We're experienced in safely removing all wasp species found in Brooklyn.
